name: Redis Port Pack
description: Redis key-value store: strings, hashes, lists, pub/sub

capabilities.name: set
capabilities.purpose: Set string value with optional TTL

capabilities.name: hgetall
capabilities.purpose: Get all hash fields and values

capabilities.name: lpush
capabilities.purpose: Push value to head of list

capabilities.name: lpop
capabilities.purpose: Pop value from head of list

capabilities.name: lrange
capabilities.purpose: Get a range of elements from a list

capabilities.name: publish
capabilities.purpose: Publish a message to a channel

capabilities.name: subscribe
capabilities.purpose: Subscribe to a channel (streaming, not yet supported)

capabilities.name: keys
capabilities.purpose: Find keys matching a glob pattern

skills.name: Redis SET
skills.description: Set string value with optional TTL

skills.name: Redis HGETALL
skills.description: Get all hash fields and values

skills.name: Redis LPUSH
skills.description: Push value to head of list

skills.name: Redis LPOP
skills.description: Pop value from head of list

skills.name: Redis LRANGE
skills.description: Get a range of elements from a list

skills.name: Redis PUBLISH
skills.description: Publish a message to a channel

skills.name: Redis SUBSCRIBE
skills.description: Subscribe to a channel (not yet supported)

skills.name: Redis KEYS
skills.description: Find keys matching a glob pattern
